question: Fill in the blank: She is ______ to music while studying.
Select the word which means 'a person who speaks two languages'.
Choose the correct preposition: He is interested ______ learning French.
Fill in the blank: Neither of the boys ______ present.
Which of the following is a collective noun?
Identify the tense: 'She has completed her assignment.'
Fill in the blank: I prefer tea ______ coffee.
Choose the correct article: He is ______ honest man.
What is the past tense of 'Fly'?
Select the word that is misspelled.
Fill in the blank: If I ______ you, I would apologize.
Which word means 'to make something less severe'?
Identify the adverb: 'She runs very fast.'
Fill in the blank: The jury ______ divided in their opinion.
Fill in the blank: She ______ to the party if she had time.
Fill in the blank: The team ______ playing well.
Select the word that means 'a speech delivered without preparation'.
Identify the error: 'Each of the players were given a medal.'
Fill in the blank: He is capable ______ doing better work.
Fill in the blank: I look forward ______ from you.
Identify the correct passive form: 'They are building a house.'
options: A house is being built by them.
A house was built by them.
A house is built by them.
answer: A house is being built by them.

question: Fill in the blank: She is senior ______ me.
Fill in the blank: The police ______ arrested the thief.
Fill in the blank: She prevented me ______ going there.
Fill in the blank: He has been waiting ______ two hours.
Choose the correct word: 'The weather is ______ today.'
Fill in the blank: He is accustomed ______ waking up early.
Identify the error: 'The news are good.'
Fill in the blank: She succeeded ______ passing the exam.
Choose the correct article: ______ Ganga is a holy river.
Fill in the blank: He is not capable ______ doing this.
Fill in the blank: He died ______ cancer.
Choose the correct word: 'He gave a ______ speech.'
Fill in the blank: She is good ______ mathematics.
Identify the error: 'He has gone to the temple yesterday.'
Fill in the blank: He is fond ______ music.
Fill in the blank: She insisted ______ going there.
Fill in the blank: He apologized ______ his mistake.
Choose the correct article: He is ______ European.
Fill in the blank: He prevented me ______ entering the room.
Identify the error: 'The scenery of Kashmir are beautiful.'
Fill in the blank: He is not familiar ______ this place.
Fill in the blank: He is married ______ my sister.
Identify the correct passive: 'She writes a letter.'
options: A letter is written by her.
A letter was written by her.
answer: A letter is written by her.

question: Fill in the blank: He is addicted ______ smoking.
Fill in the blank: She is anxious ______ her results.
Identify the error: 'He is one of the best student in the class.'
Fill in the blank: He is concerned ______ his son's future.
Choose the correct word: 'This is a ______ issue.'
Fill in the blank: She is capable ______ handling the situation.
Fill in the blank: He is similar ______ his father.
Fill in the blank: He is different ______ his brother.
Identify the error: 'Neither of them are coming.'
Fill in the blank: She is good ______ singing.
Choose the correct word: 'She is ______ in music.'
Fill in the blank: He is not aware ______ the rules.
Identify the correct passive: 'The boy broke the window.'
options: The window is broken by the boy.
The window was broken by the boy.
answer: The window was broken by the boy.

question: Fill in the blank: He is jealous ______ his friend's success.
Fill in the blank: He is confident ______ his abilities.
Identify the error: 'The poet and singer are coming.'
Fill in the blank: He is not fit ______ this job.
Choose the correct word: 'He is a ______ worker.'
Fill in the blank: He is famous ______ his honesty.
Identify the correct sentence.
options: He has a two years old son.
He has a two year old son.

question: Fill in the blank: He is proud ______ his wealth.
Fill in the blank: He is angry ______ me.
Identify the error: 'The news are true.'
Fill in the blank: He is responsible ______ the project.
Choose the correct word: 'He is ______ to succeed.'
Fill in the blank: He is blessed ______ a good memory.
Identify the correct passive: 'She will help you.'
options: You will be helped by her.
answer: You will be helped by her.

Identify the error: 'He is the tallest of the two brothers.'

Fill in the blank: He is not satisfied ______ his job.

options: She does not have any money.
She does not have no money.
She does not have none money.
She does not have any moneys.
answer: She does not have any money.
